summary: The diff implements wall-clock-based timers using setInterval+Date.now() in both SinglePlayerRace.tsx and F1RaceTrack.tsx, which directly addresses REQ-1. The AIRaceTrack.tsx file is also modified but its timer implementation is truncated and cannot be fully verified. The fix appears to cover single-player and multiplayer (F1) modes. AIRace/AIRaceTrack is a third mode whose timer fix cannot be confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: The fix applies to both single-player and time challenge modes.
missing_requirements.reason: AIRaceTrack.tsx (which appears to be a time challenge or AI race mode) is modified but the file content is truncated — it is impossible to confirm that the wall-clock timer fix was applied there as well. The file summary for AIRaceTrack is not present in frontend-file-summaries.txt, providing no additional confirmation.
